name: react-kit
description: Reusable React / Next.js implementation patterns — application & component architecture, admin panels, dashboards, CRUD lists, forms, role-aware UI, loading/error/empty/access states, data-fetching error handling, import/export UI, RTL/LTR, accessibility basics, React-19 migration, and analyzer/lint finding triage. Admin-panel creation is one capability inside the kit, not its only scope. Generic and portable — entity names, roles, APIs, and libraries are project-supplied adapter inputs.
